item.title: 怀念2017的新西兰之旅
item.description: 不知不觉4年过去了，新西兰之旅是与毛蛋的第一次出国行，虽然走之前计划做的很详细，但还是有许多未考虑周全的地方, 凭记忆记录下这次旅行中印象最为

Huabing Zhao is an ICT veteran with a passion for open source. He has a solid experience in the telecommunication and information technology industry for more than 17 years. Throughout his career, he has built a number of large-scale, cross-country OSS/BSS platforms/systems and operation tools, most of them are still running in productions. He loves open source and has been contributing to a variety of open source projects, including Istio(Service Mesh https://istio.
Machine learning学习笔记 Coursera 在线课程 Machine learning 笔记讲师: 吴恩达(Andrew Ng) 课程地址：https://www.
